text:
# Part 34 — Reciprocal Enforcement of Maintenance Orders

## PART 34 E+W RECIPROCAL ENFORCEMENT OF MAINTENANCE ORDERS


### Scope and interpretation of this Part U.K.


34.1. —(1) This Part contains rules about the reciprocal enforcement of maintenance orders.


(2) In this Part—

- “the 1920 Act” means the Maintenance Orders (Facilities for Enforcement) Act 1920 F1 ;
- “the 1972 Act” means the Maintenance Orders (Reciprocal Enforcement) Act 1972;
- F2 ...
- F3 ...
- F4 ...
- F5 ...


(3) Chapter 1 of this Part relates to the enforcement of maintenance orders in accordance with the 1920 Act.


(4) Chapter 2 of this Part relates to the enforcement of maintenance orders in accordance with [ F6 Parts 1 and 2 ] of the 1972 Act.


(5) Chapter 3 of this Part relates to the enforcement of maintenance orders in accordance with—


Textual Amendments


F1 1920 c.33 .


F2 Words in rule 34.1(2) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 19(2)(a)(i) (with reg. 27 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1574 , regs. 1 , 4(2) and S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(f) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
